name: Tranexamic Acid
description: A gentle brightening acid that targets stubborn discoloration and melasma without irritation.
scientificSummary: Inhibits the interaction between keratinocytes and melanocytes, reducing melanin transfer and visible pigmentation.
mechanismOfAction: Blocks plasminogen activator pathways that trigger melanogenesis, effectively reducing pigment production.

seo.title: Tranexamic Acid - Brightening & Melasma | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover how Tranexamic Acid fades stubborn dark spots and melasma gently and effectively.
